title: Foo Bar Postgres Readiness Race
description: Fix a startup race: the app connects to Postgres immediately and fails when the database is not yet ready. Add retry/backoff logic so the app waits for Postgres to be ready.

tasks.description: Add retry logic with backoff to the startup script so it waits for Postgres before connecting.

infrastructure.description: Postgres and a Python app. The app's startup script connects immediately and fails if Postgres is not ready.
